statement.latex: a) Conjecture: there are only finitely many nonabelian finite simple groups$G$that have a normal subset$S$closed under inversion such that$|S | > |G|/ _2|G|$and$S^2 G$. Comment of 2024: This is true for the class of alternating groups (M.\,Larsen, P.\,H.\,Tiep, Preprint, 2023, ) and for any class of groups of Lie type of bounded Lie rank (S.\,V.\,Skresanov, Preprint, 2024, ).
